name: Luis Rivera
personality: Luis is warm but no-nonsense, always quick with a joke about the morning rush and quick to notice when a regular's mood has shifted. He’s proud of his Dominican roots and loves sharing the story behind the café’s newest pastry.
quirk: He keeps a tiny jar of dried orange zest on the counter and sprinkles a pinch into every latte foam.
voice: “Mira, you need that caffeine like you need air—so here we go!”
daily: Open the shop at 6 am, pull espresso shots, chat with regulars, restock pastries, and close up after the late‑night study crowd drifts out.
